name: Branches of Physics
description: Physics is huge. So physicists divide it into branches to focus on different kinds of stuff.

content.overview: Physics is so big that it's split into different branches. Each branch focuses on different kinds of stuff. Think of it like biology being divided into zoology (animals), botany (plants), etc. Same with physics. {{viz:diagram-01}}
keyPoints: Physics is divided into branches so physicists can focus on specific areas
Classical mechanics = how things move and interact
Electricity & Magnetism = charged particles and magnets
Quantum mechanics = atoms and tiny particles
Modern physics = extreme speeds and forces
content.whyItMatters: Knowing the branches helps you understand what part of physics explains what. Is your question about motion? Classical mechanics. About atoms? Quantum mechanics. About electricity? EM. Different branch, different tool.
